PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?country ?countryLabel(COUNT(DISTINCT ?person) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q46 .
  ?position wdt:P17 ?country ; wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q696378 .
  ?statement ps:P39 ?position ; pq:P580 ?startTime .
  ?person p:P39 ?statement .
  FILTER(?startTime >= "2009-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = "en")
  }
}
GROUP BY ?country ?countryLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
